scenario: Expanded Access / Compassionate Use — physician asks about the single-patient IND process.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Web Portal

To whom it may concern,

One of my patients may benefit from your investigational compound CMG-401. Can you walk me through the single-patient IND / named-patient process for obtaining it on a compassionate-use basis? What forms and approvals does CardioMed require from the treating physician?

Dr. Paul Stenger, MD
Riverside Medical Group
labeling_notes: A single-patient IND is the FDA mechanism for compassionate use of an investigational drug for ONE patient -> Expanded Access.
Process-oriented phrasing (no patient details) — still Expanded Access.
